content:
# Dielectric Measurement

**Summary**: A method to determine the dielectric constant and conductivity of materials using electromagnetic fields.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-alarifi|Alarifi, 2015]] performed dielectric measurements on rock powders and fluids to evaluate their electrical properties.

- [[2023-abdulwahab|Abdulwahab, 2023]] used dielectric measurements to characterize the response of sandstone and carbonate rocks to wettability changes.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2023-abdulwahab|Abdulwahab, 2023]] used dielectric measurements to characterize the response of sandstone and carbonate rocks to wettability changes.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The presence of ions was found to significantly affect conductivity readings rather than the relative dielectric constant. ([[2015-alarifi|Alarifi, 2015, p. 47]])

- The imaginary permittivity and conductivity results at 10 MHz showed an linear relationship with the difference in the USBM wettibility index (R^2 = 0.9619). ([[2023-abdulwahab|Abdulwahab, 2023, p. 14]])
